<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="8dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_back" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:tint="@color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCheckoutTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="Checkout" android:textColor="@color/neon_pink" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnBack" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnBack" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnBack" />
<!-- Scrollable Summary --> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/bottomPanel" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvCheckoutTitle">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/summaryCard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/black" app:strokeColor="@color/neon_pink" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Order Summary" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" android:background="@color/neon_pink" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvOrderDetails" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="16sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalAmount" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Total: ₱0.00" android:textColor="@color/neon_pink" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
<!-- Sticky Bottom Panel --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/bottomPanel" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/black" app:cardCornerRadius="0dp" app:cardElevation="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:strokeColor="#333333" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPaymentLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Select Payment Method" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" />
<RadioGroup android:id="@+id/rgPaymentMethods" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/rbPayOnPickup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:buttonTint="@color/neon_pink" android:checked="true" android:text="Pay on Pickup" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="16sp" /> </RadioGroup>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnPlaceOrder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/neon_pink" android:text="Place Order" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurface" app:cardCornerRadius="8dp" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorOutline" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvOrderId" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Order ID: 12345" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTimestamp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Date: 2023-10-27" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvItems" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Items: Burger, Fries" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotal" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Total: PHP 120.00" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="PAID" android:textColor="@color/success" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurface" app:cardCornerRadius="8dp" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorOutline" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvOrderId" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Order ID: 12345" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTimestamp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Date: 2023-10-27" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCustomer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:drawablePadding="4dp" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:textSize="13sp" android:visibility="gone" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvItems" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Items: Burger, Fries" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotal" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Total: PHP 120.00" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="PAID" android:textColor="@color/success" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Matte Black & Super White Grey Theme (Night Mode) --> <color name="primary">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="on_primary">#121212</color> <color name="primary_container">#333333</color> <color name="on_primary_container">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="secondary">#BDBDBD</color> <color name="on_secondary">#121212</color> <color name="secondary_container">#424242</color> <color name="on_secondary_container">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="background">#121212</color> <color name="on_background">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="surface">#121212</color> <color name="on_surface">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="surface_variant">#212121</color> <color name="on_surface_variant">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="outline">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="error">#CF6679</color> <color name="on_error">#000000</color> <color name="success">#81C784</color>
<!-- Core Colors --> <color name="matte_black">#121212</color> <color name="super_white_grey">#E0E0E0</color>
<!-- Legacy aliases --> <color name="black">#121212</color> <color name="white">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="neon_pink">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="text_secondary">#BDBDBD</color>
<!-- Category Colors (Muted Dark Monochrome) --> <color name="cat_milktea">#212121</color> <color name="cat_fruit_soda">#333333</color> <color name="cat_food">#424242</color> <color name="cat_snacks">#484848</color> <color name="cat_deals">#525252</color> <color name="cat_default">#616161</color>
<!-- Messaging colors (Night mode) --> <color name="msg_sent_bg">#2979FF</color> <color name="msg_sent_text">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="msg_received_bg">#2D2D2D</color> <color name="msg_received_text">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="msg_input_bg">#1E1E1E</color> <color name="msg_time_text">#BDBDBD</color> </resources>

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- ── Night Mode Palette ────────────────────────────────────────── --> <!-- Based on image_1 app screenshot: deep black bg + vivid red accents -->
<color name="primary">#D32F2F</color> <!-- Vivid Red --> <color name="on_primary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="primary_container">#8B0000</color> <!-- Deep Red container --> <color name="on_primary_container">#FFCDD2</color>
<color name="secondary">#FF5252</color> <!-- Bright Red accent --> <color name="on_secondary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="secondary_container">#5E0006</color><!-- Very dark red --> <color name="on_secondary_container">#FFB3B3</color>
<color name="background">#0D0D0D</color> <!-- Near-black --> <color name="on_background">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="surface">#1A1A1A</color> <!-- Dark card surface --> <color name="on_surface">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="surface_variant">#2A0A0A</color> <!-- Dark red-tinted card --> <color name="on_surface_variant">#FFCDD2</color>
<color name="outline">#8B0000</color> <color name="outline_variant">#5E0006</color>
<!-- Status Colors --> <color name="error">#FF5252</color> <color name="on_error">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="success">#81C784</color> <color name="on_success">#000000</color>
<!-- Category Colors (dark red tones) --> <color name="cat_milktea">#3A0A0A</color> <color name="cat_fruit_soda">#4A0E0E</color> <color name="cat_food">#5C1010</color> <color name="cat_snacks">#6B1212</color> <color name="cat_deals">#8B0000</color> <color name="cat_default">#D32F2F</color>
<!-- Legacy support --> <color name="white">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="black">#0D0D0D</color> <color name="neon_pink">#FF3333</color> <!-- Neon red accent --> <color name="text_secondary">#FFABAB</color> <color name="matte_black">#0D0D0D</color> <color name="super_white_grey">#2A2A2A</color>
<!-- Messaging colors --> <color name="msg_sent_bg">#D32F2F</color> <color name="msg_sent_text">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="msg_received_bg">#2A2A2A</color> <color name="msg_received_text">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="msg_input_bg">#1E1E1E</color> <color name="msg_time_text">#FFABAB</color> </resources>

<resources xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"> <!-- Base application theme. --> <style name="Base.Theme.SanzinKstore" parent="Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar"> <!-- Night mode: vivid red + deep black --> <item name="colorPrimary">@color/primary</item> <item name="colorOnPrimary">@color/on_primary</item> <item name="colorPrimaryContainer">@color/primary_container</item> <item name="colorOnPrimaryContainer">@color/on_primary_container</item>
<item name="colorSecondary">@color/secondary</item> <item name="colorOnSecondary">@color/on_secondary</item> <item name="colorSecondaryContainer">@color/secondary_container</item> <item name="colorOnSecondaryContainer">@color/on_secondary_container</item>
<!-- Dark status bar — light icons on black --> <item name="android:statusBarColor">@color/background</item> <item name="android:windowLightStatusBar">false</item>
<item name="android:windowBackground">@color/background</item> <item name="colorSurface">@color/surface</item> <item name="colorOnSurface">@color/on_surface</item> <item name="colorOutline">@color/outline</item> </style> </resources>

<!-- Category Colors (red tones — no orange) --> <color name="cat_milktea">#E53935</color> <color name="cat_fruit_soda">#EF5350</color> <color name="cat_food">#C62828</color> <color name="cat_snacks">#B71C1C</color> <color name="cat_deals">#9B0F06</color> <color name="cat_default">#5E0006</color>
<!-- Legacy support --> <color name="white">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="black">#5E0006</color> <color name="neon_pink">#9B0F06</color> <!-- Main accent: dark red --> <color name="text_secondary">#8B3E38</color> <color name="matte_black">#5E0006</color> <color name="super_white_grey">#F5E0C0</color>

<resources> <string name="app_name">SanZin K-Store</string> <string name="cart_text">CART</string> <string name="add_product_content_description">Add Product</string> <string name="select_payment_method">Select Payment Method</string> <string name="pay_on_pickup">Pay on Pickup</string> <string name="pay_online_gcash">Pay Online (GCash)</string> <string name="order_placed_successfully">Order placed successfully!</string> <string name="failed_to_place_order">Failed to place order: %1$s</string> <string name="cart_empty">Your cart is empty!</string> <string name="proceeding_to_checkout">Proceeding to checkout for ₱%1$.2f</string> <string name="default_web_client_id" translatable="false">902665820500-mevo35t2jh2nc7g5u7p4ra96tcftrr1l.apps.googleusercontent.com</string>
<!-- Login screen --> <string name="login_title">SanZin K-Store</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Your local K-goods store</string> <string name="btn_guest">Continue as Guest</string> <string name="btn_login">Login</string> <string name="btn_register">Register</string> <string name="btn_about_us">About Us</string> <string name="btn_privacy_policy">Privacy Policy</string> <string name="divider_or">— OR —</string>
<!-- Login dialog --> <string name="login_dialog_title">Welcome Back</string> <string name="hint_email">Email Address</string> <string name="hint_password">Password</string> <string name="btn_sign_in">Sign In</string> <string name="btn_sign_in_google">Continue with Google</string>
<!-- Register dialog --> <string name="register_dialog_title">Create Account</string> <string name="hint_full_name">Full Name</string> <string name="hint_confirm_password">Confirm Password</string> <string name="btn_create_account">Create Account</string> <string name="btn_register_google">Register with Google</string>
<!-- Guest blocked message --> <string name="guest_purchase_blocked">You need an account to make purchases.
Please Login or Register.</string>
<!-- Seller access (legacy) --> <string name="login_continue_google">CONTINUE WITH GOOGLE</string> <string name="seller_access">Seller Portal</string> <string name="seller_email_hint">Seller Email</string> <string name="seller_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="seller_login_button">LOGIN AS SELLER</string> <string name="customer_login_button">CONTINUE AS CUSTOMER</string>
<!-- About Us --> <string name="about_us_title">About Us</string> <string name="about_us_content">Welcome to SanZin K-Store! 

We are a passionate local store dedicated to bringing you the finest Korean goods, meals, and beverages right to your neighborhood.

From authentic ramen and tteokbokki to refreshing milk teas and fruit sodas — everything is prepared with care and quality ingredients.

Founded in 2024, SanZin K-Store strives to make Korean culture accessible and enjoyable for everyone.

Thank you for supporting a local business! ❤️

Contact us:
sanzinkstore@gmail.com</string>
<!-- Privacy Policy --> <string name="privacy_policy_title">Privacy Policy</string> <string name="privacy_policy_content">Privacy Policy — SanZin K-Store
Last updated: April 2026

1. Information We Collect
We collect your name, email address, and order history when you create an account or place an order.

2. How We Use Your Information
• To process and fulfill your orders
• To send order confirmations and updates
• To improve our products and services
• To respond to customer support requests

3. Data Storage
Your data is stored securely using Google Firebase services. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.

4. Passwords
Passwords are hashed using SHA-256 before transmission and are never stored in plain text.

5. Your Rights
You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us at sanzinkstore@gmail.com.

6. Changes to This Policy
We may update this policy periodically. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

For questions, contact: sanzinkstore@gmail.com</string>
<!-- Inventory --> <string name="inventory_title">Store Inventory</string> <string name="update_inventory">UPDATE INVENTORY</string> <string name="no_image_preview">No Image Preview</string> <string name="change_photo">Change Photo</string> <string name="image_url_hint">Image URL (Optional)</string> <string name="available_inventory">Available in Stock</string> <string name="remove_product">REMOVE FROM STORE</string> <string name="product_name_hint">Product Name</string> <string name="description_hint">Description</string> <string name="price_hint">Price (₱)</string> <string name="category_hint">Category</string>
<string name="cancel_order">CANCEL ORDER</string> <string name="checkout">CHECK OUT</string> <string name="total_amount">TOTAL: ₱%1$.2f</string> </resources>

<resources xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"> <!-- Base application theme. --> <style name="Base.Theme.SanzinKstore" parent="Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar"> <!-- Primary brand color. --> <item name="colorPrimary">@color/primary</item> <item name="colorOnPrimary">@color/on_primary</item> <item name="colorPrimaryContainer">@color/primary_container</item> <item name="colorOnPrimaryContainer">@color/on_primary_container</item>
<!-- Secondary brand color. --> <item name="colorSecondary">@color/secondary</item> <item name="colorOnSecondary">@color/on_secondary</item> <item name="colorSecondaryContainer">@color/secondary_container</item> <item name="colorOnSecondaryContainer">@color/on_secondary_container</item>
<!-- Status bar color. --> <item name="android:statusBarColor">?attr/colorSurface</item> <item name="android:windowLightStatusBar">true</item>
<!-- Background colors --> <item name="android:windowBackground">@color/background</item> <item name="colorSurface">@color/surface</item> <item name="colorOnSurface">@color/on_surface</item> <item name="colorOutline">@color/outline</item> </style>
<style name="RoundedSquareTop"> <item name="cornerFamily">rounded</item> <item name="cornerSizeTopLeft">12dp</item> <item name="cornerSizeTopRight">12dp</item> <item name="cornerSizeBottomLeft">0dp</item> <item name="cornerSizeBottomRight">0dp</item> </style>
<style name="Theme.SanzinKstore" parent="Base.Theme.SanzinKstore" />
<style name="CustomDialogTheme" parent="Theme.Material3.DayNight.Dialog"> <item name="android:windowBackground">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="android:windowIsTranslucent">true</item> <item name="android:windowContentOverlay">@null</item> <item name="android:windowNoTitle">true</item> <item name="android:backgroundDimEnabled">true</item> </style> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# SanZin K-Store — Navigation & Flow
```mermaid flowchart TD A([Start]) --> B[Login Screen]
B --> C[Email / Password] B --> D[Google Sign In]
C --> E[Login] D --> F[Google Auth]
E --> G{User Role} F --> G
G -- Customer --> H[Customer Dashboard] G -- Admin / Seller --> I[Staff Dashboard]
H --> J[Browse Products] J --> K[Add to Cart] K --> L{Cart Empty?} L -- No --> M[Checkout] L -- Yes --> J M --> N[Pay on Pickup] N --> O[Confirm Order] O --> P([Order Placed ✓])
H --> Q[Chat with Seller] Q --> R[Send / Receive Messages]
I --> S[Manage Inventory] S --> T{Action} T -- Add/Edit Product --> U[AdminProduct Form] T -- Toggle Availability --> V[Update Firestore] U --> V
I --> W[Monitor Orders / Logs] W --> X[View Transaction History]
I --> Y[Respond to Customer Chat] Y --> R
P --> Z([Exit]) X --> Z ```

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# SanZin K-Store — System Architecture
## Overview
SanZin K-Store is an Android POS + e-commerce app for a Korean goods store. It supports two roles: **Seller/Admin** and **Customer**, with full Firebase backend integration.
---
## High-Level Architecture
``` ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ ANDROID CLIENT (App) │ │ │ │ ┌─────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ ┌───────────────────────────┐ │ │ │ Auth Layer │ │ UI Layer │ │ Data Layer │ │ │ │ │ │ │ │ │ │ │ │ LoginActiv. │ │ MainActivity │ │ FirebaseFirestore │ │ │ │ GoogleSignIn│ │ Inventory │ │ FirebaseAuth │ │ │ │ OTP Reset │ │ Profile │ │ CloudinaryHelper │ │ │ └─────────────┘ │ Chat │ │ PayMongoService (Retrofit)│ │ │ │ Logs │ │ SharedPreferences (cart) │ │ │ └──────────────┘ └───────────────────────────┘ │ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │ │ │ ▼ ▼ ▼ ┌──────────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ │ Firebase Auth │ │ Cloud Firestore │ │ Cloudinary CDN │ │ │ │ │ │ │ │ Email/Pass │ │ /users │ │ Product images │ │ Google OAuth │ │ /products │ │ (secure_url) │ │ OTP via email│ │ /orders │ └──────────────────┘ └──────────────┘ │ /conversations │ │ /passwordResets │ └──────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌──────────────────────┐ │ Firebase Cloud │ │ Messaging (FCM) │ │ │ │ Push notifications │ │ for new messages │ └──────────────────────┘ │ (payment) ▼ ┌──────────────────────┐ │ PayMongo API │ │ │ │ GCash / Maya │ │ Payment sources │ └──────────────────────┘ ```
---
## Component Breakdown
### 1. Activities & Fragments
| Component | Role | User | |---|---|---| | `LoginActivity` | Auth: email/password, Google Sign-In, OTP forgot password | Both | | `MainActivity` | Hosts ViewPager + Seller POS panel OR Customer home | Both | | `ProductListFragment` | Product grid with category chips; live Firestore listener | Both | | `CartFragment` | Shopping cart review | Customer | | `CheckoutFragment` | Order summary + payment method select | Customer | | `InventoryActivity` | Product management grid (CRUD via AdminProductActivity) | Seller | | `AdminProductActivity` | Add / Edit / Delete a product, image upload | Seller | | `ProfileActivity` | Display profile, role badge, change password | Both | | `LogsActivity` | Order history and print/export CSV | Seller | | `ChatActivity` | Real-time 1-to-1 chat (customer ↔ seller) | Both | | `SellerInboxActivity` | Inbox: list of all customer conversations | Seller | | `SettingsActivity` | Dark/Light mode toggle | Both |
### 2. Adapters
| Adapter | Used In | |---|---| | `ProductAdapter` | `ProductListFragment`, `InventoryActivity` | | `CartAdapter` | `CartFragment`, edit-cart dialog | | `ConversationAdapter` | `SellerInboxActivity` | | `MessageAdapter` | `ChatActivity` |
### 3. Models
| Model | Firestore Collection | Key Fields | |---|---|---| | `Product` | `/products` | name, price, imgUrl, category, subCategory, available | | `Order` | `/orders` | userId, items[], totalAmount, paymentMethod, isPaid, status | | `CartItem` | (in-memory / SharedPreferences) | product, quantity | | `Conversation` | `/conversations` | participantIds[], lastMessage, unreadCount | | `Message` | `/conversations/{id}/messages` | senderId, text, timestamp |
### 4. External Services
| Service | Purpose | SDK/Library | |---|---|---| | Firebase Auth | Authentication (Email + Google) | `firebase-auth` | | Cloud Firestore | NoSQL database | `firebase-firestore` | | Firebase Cloud Messaging | Push notifications | `firebase-messaging` | | Cloudinary | Product image CDN & upload | `cloudinary-android` | | Picasso | Image loading & caching | `com.squareup.picasso` | | PayMongo | Online payments (GCash, Maya) | Retrofit + REST | | Imgur | Secondary image upload fallback | OkHttp + REST |
---
## Firestore Data Structure
``` (default) [database] ├── users/ │ └── {uid}/ │ ├── displayName: "John Doe" │ ├── email: "john@example.com" │ ├── isSeller: false │ ├── provider: "email" | "google" │ ├── fcmToken: "..." │ └── createdAt: Timestamp │ ├── products/ │ └── {productId}/ │ ├── name: "Shin Ramyun" │ ├── description: "..." │ ├── price: 65.0 │ ├── imgUrl: "https://res.cloudinary.com/..." │ ├── category: "Goods" | "Meals" | "Beverages" │ ├── subCategory: "Ramen" | "Milktea" | ... │ ├── available: true | false │ └── createdAt: Timestamp │ ├── orders/ │ └── {orderId}/ │ ├── userId: "..." │ ├── items: [ { product: {...}, quantity: 2 }, ... ] │ ├── totalAmount: 130.0 │ ├── paymentMethod: "CASH_POS" | "PAY_ON_PICKUP" | "GCASH" | "MAYA" │ ├── isPaid: true | false │ ├── status: "PENDING" | "COMPLETED" │ └── timestamp: long │ ├── conversations/ │ └── {conversationId}/ │ ├── participantIds: ["uid1", "uid2"] │ ├── lastMessage: "Hello" │ ├── lastMessageTime: Timestamp │ └── messages/ [subcollection] │ └── {msgId}/ │ ├── senderId: "..." │ ├── text: "..." │ └── timestamp: Timestamp │ └── passwordResets/ └── {email}/ ├── otp: "123456" ├── expiresAt: long (millis) └── email: "..." ```
---
## Role-Based Access
``` App Launch │ ├──[isSeller = true]──► Seller POS View │ • Product grid (all products) │ • Cart + Accept/Cancel │ • Inventory management │ • Order logs + print/CSV │ • Seller inbox (chat) │ ├──[isSeller = false]──► Customer View │ • Product grid (available only shown as orderable) │ • Cart + Checkout │ • Payment (Cash/GCash/Maya) │ • Chat with seller │ └──[Guest]──────────────► Browse Only • View products • Blocked from cart/checkout ```
